Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content creation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every marketing email reflects live inventory and accurate product info, reducing customer confusion and support inquiries.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling daily marketing email using scraped R1 product data, tailored for brake parts buyers.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates hours of manual copywriting daily and produces consistent, on-brand email content at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated marketing email to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, featured parts, and current promotions to feed into email generation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Grounds AI-generated content in real product data, ensuring emails are accurate and relevant to DFC buyers.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email tailored to Dynamic Friction Company's product catalog and brand voice.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces daily campaign-ready copy without writer involvement, maintaining brand consistency across every send.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Distributes the AI-drafted DFC marketing email to contact lists through the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send workflow for DFC campaigns, ensuring daily outreach happens without manual intervention.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, order details, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for automated processing, ensuring no ticket is missed or delayed.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each support ticket by issue type and drafts a contextually appropriate reply for the R1 support team to review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to handle higher volume with faster resolution.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for agent review and sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support activity inside the existing CRM workflow, giving agents a ready-to-send response with zero context switching.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all Amazon in-box flyer form submissions from HubSpot, capturing customer-reported return reasons and product issues.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates scattered customer feedback from physical flyer submissions into a single structured data pull, removing manual export steps.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and issue trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the product and operations team a live, sortable view of return patterns and recurring issues to prioritize fixes and reduce return rates.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces real-time buying signals so sales reps can reach out at peak interest moments, increasing conversion likelihood.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant alert to the DFC sales team via Teams message and email with the customer's activity details and CRM link.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates manual monitoring and ensures sales reps are notified within seconds of customer activity, enabling timely and personalized outreach.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently under development with connections to be determined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer-facing interactions at scale once deployed, reducing inbound support load.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings to identify businesses near Cerritos that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates daily prospecting that would otherwise require hours of manual research, generating a fresh pipeline of warm leads every day.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for each discovered business to enable direct outreach.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Creates contact records in HubSpot and sends personalized warm intro emails pitching the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Delivers daily automated outreach to a targeted local audience, filling the sublet pipeline without any manual prospecting or emailing effort.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes cross-brand ad performance data automatically, eliminating manual report downloads and enabling faster optimization cycles.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget shifts, and keyword actions.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers expert-level ad analysis at scale across both brands simultaneously, improving ROAS and reducing wasted ad spend without analyst hours.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching specified keywords, pulling channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Instantly surfaces relevant creators at scale across the largest video platform, replacing hours of manual channel searching.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers matching Instagram creators using the same keywords, collecting follower counts, engagement data, and profile details.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across Instagram simultaneously, building a multi-platform candidate pool without additional manual effort.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Processes and enriches all discovered creator profiles, extracting audience relevance, content themes, and brand fit signals.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw profile data into qualified, insight-rich creator records, saving hours of manual vetting per discovery session.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria including engagement rate, audience size, niche relevance, and brand fit.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Instantly ranks an entire creator pool by partnership value, allowing marketing teams to focus outreach exclusively on top-tier matches.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and learned outreach sequences stored in Drive documents.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes creator data and prompt templates so the agent always works from the latest approved outreach strategy without manual file sharing.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator based on their profile and the learned sequence prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand outreach at scale, replacing hours of manual copywriting per creator contact.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to each qualified creator from the designated sender account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator prospecting outreach, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators simultaneously with zero manual sending effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes stored in Drive to inform response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real past negotiation patterns, improving deal closure rates by leveraging what has actually worked with creators before.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the incoming creator reply and generates a contextual negotiation response using learned conversation patterns from prior deals.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps negotiations moving without requiring a team member to craft each reply, reducing response lag and maintaining deal momentum.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-generated negotiation reply back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Compresses negotiation cycles from days to hours by ensuring timely, consistent responses across all active creator conversations simultaneously.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates the manual weekly task of matching vehicle fitments against availability data, cutting load sheet preparation from hours to seconds.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a HubSpot email draft with the generated load sheet and sales sheet attached, then sends it to the target list.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Ensures every Monday the right promotional email goes out on schedule with accurate product data, driving consistent weekly sales engagement without manual campaign setup.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a confirmation message to the designated Teams channel once the email has been created and sent successfully.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Gives the marketing team instant visibility into campaign send status, reducing the need for manual verification checks each Monday.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling product launch email copy and monthly recap content based on new product data and brand guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email drafts in seconds, freeing the marketing team from writing first-draft copy for every new product introduction.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot with the AI-generated copy, attaches the relevant sales sheets, and stages them for review or immediate send.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Compresses the time from new product data to send-ready HubSpot campaign from hours to minutes, ensuring DFC is first to market with every launch.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data from HubSpot for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Replaces manual HubSpot report exports, ensuring lifecycle data in the deck is always current and pulled consistently each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts SMS campaign performance metrics including sends, clicks, revenue, and subscriber growth for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS performance data automatically, eliminating manual Attentive dashboard screenshots and data entry into the deck.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, session data, conversion metrics, and channel attribution for the monthly reporting window.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most time-intensive part of deck prep by pulling GA4 data programmatically instead of manually copying figures slide by slide.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves organic search impressions, clicks, average position, and top-performing queries for the period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Adds SEO performance context to the deck automatically, giving leadership a complete organic visibility picture without manual Search Console exports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, replacing placeholder values with live data and formatted visuals.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully populated 8-slide reporting section in minutes instead of the 2–3 hours typically required for manual data entry and formatting.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts has low impressions or ranking positions compared to competitor content targets.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Focuses content production on the highest-opportunity search terms, maximizing organic traffic growth per blog post published.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for search intent and on-page best practices.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog content at scale, enabling R1 Concepts to close keyword gaps faster than manual writing cycles allow.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated article to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including meta title, description, and focus keyphrase.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Completes the full content pipeline from gap identification to live optimized post without any manual CMS work, accelerating organic ranking potential.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor names, PO numbers, due dates, and outstanding quantities for follow-up processing.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Replaces manual ERP report pulls and spreadsheet prep, ensuring vendor follow-up is based on complete and current PO data every time.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms the ERP export data and uploads it to HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in the PO chase email sequence.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against the uploaded New Availability Guide data entirely within the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives any team member the ability to generate accurate load sheets on demand without needing backend systems, spreadsheet formulas, or technical support.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched results as a formatted Excel load sheet file directly from the browser to the user's local machine.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Launches a Chrome browser session, navigates to Attentive, and clones the most recent MHM SMS campaign as the base for the new week.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product lines, and revenue figures for analysis.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete and current sales dataset as the foundation for all downstream segmentation, dashboards, and campaign targeting.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into cohorts such as at-risk, lapsed, cross-sell candidates, and loyal buyers, then enrolls each segment in the appropriate email automation sequence.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Triggers targeted SMS messages to high-value segments such as lapsed buyers or reorder candidates based on the Dream ERP segmentation output.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors William Nguyen's Teams channel for a newly uploaded Excel file each week containing the latest Super Session Saturday content.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking and ensures the automation triggers instantly when new content is ready, saving 15-20 minutes of weekly coordination.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a fresh hosted download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures recipients always get the current file with a live, trackable link — no broken or outdated downloads.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent, on-brand weekly email with zero manual build time, keeping DFC subscribers engaged every Saturday morning.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully written B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword-optimized prompts.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready content at scale without writer costs, consistently targeting high-value search terms that drive qualified traffic.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes it as a formatted post with proper SEO metadata, headings, and category tags.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps DFC's blog consistently active with minimal human effort, building domain authority and organic search visibility over time.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Puppeteer scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, Bing Images for vehicle photos, and Wikipedia for make/model/year specs and history to seed the content pipeline.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research per episode by automatically gathering visual assets and factual vehicle context before a single word is written.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the scraped vehicle data and generates a fully structured Friction Friday script including intro hook, segment breakdowns, brake-specific commentary, and outro.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a consistent branded voice.

Friction Friday Automation.action: An Apps Script webhook receives all final deliverables — script text, audio file links, thumbnail asset paths, and assembled video metadata — and logs them to a structured tracking sheet.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Gives the team one centralized production record per episode so nothing gets lost between tools and publishing status is always visible.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports customer records from Dream ERP including CustomerIDs, contact details, and purchase history to be mapped to HubSpot contacts.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with connections and workflow not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, click-through rates, and index coverage for all DFC blog posts.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and extracts them for processing.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Captures incoming customer support tickets from all channels and queues them for AI classification.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young drops the monthly new arrivals file into a designated Teams channel, triggering the downstream automation.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies prospective shipping carriers from the contact database and enrolls them in an automated outreach sequence that sends RFQ emails.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration form and tags them with a qualifying audience flag.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors project tasks, due dates, and status changes across relevant Asana boards and surfaces items that need attention.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the raw inventory query results into a clean, structured catalog layout — clearly separating stocked parts from inventory gaps for the target vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates manual formatting work and produces a professional, easy-to-read output that Mark can immediately share with customers or use for procurement decisions.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, ready to use or forward to a customer.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, compressing what was likely a multi-hour manual task into an automated instant turnaround.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent lookups with one automated pull, giving every stakeholder the same accurate real-time picture simultaneously.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report rows with the live Dream inventory data and flags any parts that have no current source — no stock, no order, no transit.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable triage document, making dead-end parts immediately visible so the team can escalate or find alternatives.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder lines, pre-filled with accurate status details pulled directly from the enriched report.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Saves hours of manual email drafting per week and ensures customers receive consistent, accurate status updates without waiting for a rep to find the time.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract all available two-piece rotor listings by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor and market fitment data that would take days to gather manually, giving DFC a complete view of what the two-piece rotor market actually covers.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and outputs a structured sheet showing matches, gaps, and new opportunity fitments for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has coverage and where real product gaps exist, turning raw scraped data into a strategic inventory decision tool.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for two-piece rotors on specific vehicle applications identified as gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from actual customers without requiring any manual outreach effort, validating product decisions before DFC commits to inventory.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — to extract the full text of every running ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant, exhaustive coverage of all live ad copy without anyone having to manually open and read individual ads in Ads Manager.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all extracted ad copy for the specified phrases or keywords and flags every exact match, recording which ad, which field, and the surrounding copy context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across all platforms in seconds, replacing a manual review process that could take hours and still miss occurrences.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy snippet where the target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable investigation report directly to the requester's inbox, enabling immediate compliance, legal, or editorial action.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications and extracts the resume attachment, applicant name, and email address from each message.
Resume Bot.impact: Catches every application the moment it arrives and routes it into the pipeline automatically, eliminating the risk of resumes sitting unread in a shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured Drive folder organized by role and date so all applications are stored in a consistent, retrievable location.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates an organized, searchable archive of all applicants without any manual filing, making it easy to revisit candidates later.

Resume Bot.action: Reads and scores each resume against the open role requirements, produces a hiring recommendation, and determines whether the candidate should be advanced, denied, or held in a pending queue.
Resume Bot.impact: Removes hours of initial resume screening per hiring cycle and ensures every applicant gets a consistent, criteria-based evaluation rather than a subjective first glance.

Resume Bot.action: Sends automated reply emails to denied or no-resume candidates, logs all decisions to a Sheets dashboard, and places paused-role candidates in a dedicated Pending tab for future review.
Resume Bot.impact: Closes the loop with every applicant professionally and instantly while maintaining a real-time hiring dashboard that keeps the team aligned without any manual data entry.

summary: The AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 56 total agents across the team — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, our completed agents continue running daily, weekly, and monthly workflows that drive real impact across email marketing, SEO, paid media, creator outreach, and operations. We're in great shape heading into the weeks ahead as our in-progress builds move closer to launch!
